Firewall_recommended_fix: Enable Domain, Private, and Public firewall profiles. In PowerShell: Set-NetFirewallProfile -Profile Domain,Private,Public -Enabled True
Microsoft Defender_recommended_fix: Enable Microsoft Defender Antivirus and real-time protection, or verify that another managed EDR/AV is active.
Defender Signatures_message: Could not calculate signature age: Invalid isoformat string: '/Date(1781499832000)/'
Defender Signatures_recommended_fix: Run Windows Update or Update-MpSignature. Confirm signature updates are managed by policy if this is a domain device.
BitLocker_message: BitLocker protection is off on C:
BitLocker_recommended_fix: Enable BitLocker on the operating system drive and securely escrow the recovery key.
BitLocker All Volumes_message: C: protection is 0; C: encryption is 0%; D: protection is 0; D: encryption is 0%
BitLocker All Volumes_recommended_fix: Enable BitLocker on all fixed data volumes or document why a volume is exempt.
Windows Update_recommended_fix: Install pending Windows updates and reboot if required. Verify WSUS, Intune, or update policy health.
Windows Update Age_message: Last installed update KB5094135 was installed on 2026-06-10 (5 day(s) ago)
Windows Update Age_recommended_fix: Install the latest cumulative update and confirm the device is checking in to its update management system.
RDP_message: RDP is enabled, but Network Level Authentication is enabled
RDP_recommended_fix: Disable RDP where not needed. If required, enable NLA, restrict firewall scope, and require VPN or strong conditional access.
SMB_recommended_fix: Disable SMBv1, disable insecure guest logons, and require SMB signing where practical.
UAC_message: UAC is enabled with secure elevation prompts
UAC_recommended_fix: Enable UAC, admin approval mode, and secure desktop prompts.
Secure Boot / TPM_message: Secure Boot enabled and TPM ready
Secure Boot / TPM_recommended_fix: Enable TPM and Secure Boot in firmware/UEFI where supported.
Event Logging_recommended_fix: Enable success and failure auditing for logon, account logon, account management, policy change, and privilege use events.

Password Policy_recommended_fix: Set a strong minimum password length and configure account lockout thresholds appropriate for the environment.
Failed Logins_recommended_fix: Review Event ID 4625 details, source IPs, usernames, and correlated successful logons.
Network Shares_message: No non-default SMB network shares found
Network Shares_recommended_fix: Remove unneeded shares and document business owners for required shares.
Share Permissions_recommended_fix: Remove Everyone, Guest, and Anonymous access. Limit share permissions to approved groups using least privilege.

LSA / Credential Guard_recommended_fix: Enable LSA protection and Credential Guard where supported. Validate compatibility before broad deployment.
